title: Issuing and Treasury for platforms sample app
excerpt: Use the Stripe Next.js sample app to start your own Issuing and Treasury for platforms integration. In addition to a full suite of documentation and SDKs for Stripe Issuing and Stripe Treasury for platforms, we offer a Next.js sample app. See a demo of our sample app at [baas.stripe.dev](https://baas.stripe.dev), or check out the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/stripe-samples/issuing-treasury). The sample app is a Next.js app that leverages TypeScript, React, and Material UI. You can fork the project from the [Stripe samples GitHub repository](https://github.com/stripe-samples/issuing-treasury) and use the included components as a starting point for your own app.…
